title: Bosch Professional line Laser GLL 12V-100-33 CG (3 x 360° Green Laser, Working Range 100 m (Radius) with Receiver, IP 65, Levelling Remote App, LB 10, DK 20, GBA 12V 2.0Ah, GAL 12V-40, Pouch, L-Boxx)
description: Bosch Professional line laser GLL 12V-100-33 CG (3 x 360° green laser, working range 100 m (radius) with receiver, IP 65, Levelling Remote App, LB 10, DK 20, GBA 12V 2.0Ah, GAL 12V-40, Pouch, L-Boxx)
features: DUAL POWER SOURCE: Experience uninterrupted work with the flexibility to switch between 12V Li-Ion battery and AA alkaline batteries
HIGH ACCURACY & RANGE: Reliable alignment with precision tasks with a levelling accuracy of ± 0,3 mm/m with a working range of 30 m (radius) and 100 m (radius) with a receiver.
DURABILITY: Durable design with rubber enforced housing and IP65 rating ensures reliability in tough working conditions
CONNECTIVITY: Hands-free line control of the 3 x 360° laser lines via the Levelling Remote app for more accurate and time efficient working
ITEMS INCLUDED: GLL 12V-100-33 CG, LB 10 mount, DK 20 ceiling clip, GBA 12V 2.0Ah (Li-Ion battery), GAL 12V-40 charger, Pouch, Green Target Plate, L-Boxx 136
